name: El Paso Chicken
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Salsa, Old El Paso chunky
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 1/2 cup salsa and drain.
2. Beat together with cream cheese and set aside.
3. In a 11x7-inch baking dish, combine the remaining salsa and enchilada sauce; reserve 1/2 cup sauce. Stir in the rice and set aside.
4. Pound the chicken breast halves to about 1/2 inch thickness.
5. Spoon 1/4 of the cream cheese mix into the center of a chicken breast half.
6. Roll up and place seam side down on rice.
7. Repeat with all the breast halves.
8. Pour reserved sauce over chicken.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45-60 minutes or until chicken is done.
